name: Spanish Rice 3
recipeIngredient: 14.5 oz Tomatoes with liquid, cut up
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Taste of Home magazine, 94/08-09
In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and drain. Stir in taco seasoning, kidney beans and salsa. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove peppers from the pan and discard seeds and stems. Place peppers in boiling water for 3 minutes, then drain.
Spoon about half a cup of meat mixture into each pepper half. Transfer to an ungreased baking dish. Cover and bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes or until peppers are crisp-tender and filling is heated through. Top each with tomato, cheese, and a dollop of sour cream.
